title: Lexpert Ranked Immigration Lawyers in 2026 - MKS Recognized
content:
We are honoured to share that three of our lawyers have been recognized in the 2026 Canadian Legal Lexpert Directory as leading Canadian Immigration Law practitioners.
Aleksandar Stojicevic, Rudolf Kischer and Kyle Hyndman were all named among Lexpert’s recommended immigration lawyers, reflecting their experience, judgment, and the confidence of peers across the profession, with Kyle also receiving the “Most Frequently Recommended” designation.  Lexpert rankings are determined through confidential peer surveys of lawyers across Canada and are widely regarded as one of the profession’s most respected benchmarks.
We are grateful for this recognition and for the continued trust of our clients and colleagues.
To schedule a consultation with one of our award-winning lawyers, click here .
